heading: Advisory group
label: 5305c Advisory group
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 10 and is classified to .section 9 of Pub. L. 103–391section 5306 of this title

Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “Federal Advisory Committee Act” in heading and “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in text.Pub. L. 117–286
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “Federal Advisory Committee Act” in heading and “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in text.Pub. L. 117–286

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To assist in carrying out this chapter, the Secretary may convene an advisory group consisting of individuals representing public and private organizations actively involved in the conservation of rhinoceros and tiger species.

children.label: A
children.text: ensure that each meeting of the advisory group is open to the public; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide, at each meeting, an opportunity for interested persons to present oral or written statements concerning items on the agenda.

children.heading: Notice
children.label: 2 Notice
children.text: The Secretary shall provide to the public timely notice of each meeting of the advisory group.

children.heading: Minutes
children.label: 3 Minutes
children.text: Minutes of each meeting of the advisory group shall be kept by the Secretary and shall be made available to the public.

children.heading: Exemption from chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: c Exemption from chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply to the advisory group.
